body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

meta.title: Challenging Scenarios and Problems in Internet Addressing

achieve that and today generally we've kind of just fallen into um mechanisms that were convenient because there was a lot of information that was sent um purely unencrypted available to anyone so you while we recognize that this is something that has evolved organically there are a lot of problems with deepak inspection as your main mechanism for routing traffic it's complex there are a lot of and the other alternative is to put more trust into the network um that if you're not going to just give generic markings you're going to need to have user opt-in application opt-in and network opt-in
